name: CK Life OS - Memory Sync Preflight

parameters.jsCode: const body = $json.body || $json; const rows = Array.isArray(body.memory_rows) ? body.memory_rows.length : 0; const approved = rows > 0 && !!body.sensitivity_reviewed && !!body.sync_target && body.sync === true && !!body.approval_reference; return [{ json: { product: 'CK / Life OS', workflow_id: 'ck-life-os-memory-sync-preflight', rows, approved, required: ['memory_rows', 'sensitivity_reviewed', 'sync_target', 'sync=true', 'approval_reference'], memory_sync_performed: false, external_send: false, source_write: false, rollback: 'Delete exported object by manifest id; disable sync target; keep CK local memory as source of truth.' } }];

staticData.ck_life_os_boundary: disabled import; no memory sync by default
